faq_page.meta_title: Frequently Asked Questions - Car Injury Clinic

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about car accidents and personal injuries

intro.title: Do you have questions about your case?
intro.description: Here you'll find answers to the most frequently asked questions about car accidents, personal injuries, and the legal process. If you can't find the answer you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us directly.

q1.question: How long do I have to file a car accident lawsuit?
q1.answer: In most states, you have between 2 and 3 years from the date of the accident to file a personal injury lawsuit. However, this timeframe can vary by state and the specific circumstances of your case. It's important to consult with an attorney as soon as possible to protect your rights.

q2.question: What should I do immediately after a car accident?
q2.answer: After an accident, it's crucial to: 1) Check for injuries and call 911 if necessary, 2) Document the scene with photos, 3) Exchange information with the other driver, 4) Get witness information, 5) Report the accident to your insurance company, and 6) Seek medical attention even if you don't feel pain immediately.

q3.question: How much could my car accident case be worth?
q3.answer: The value of your case depends on several factors: the severity of your injuries, medical expenses, lost income, pain and suffering, and the degree of fault of the other driver. Each case is unique, and an experienced attorney can evaluate your specific situation to give you a more accurate estimate.

q4.question: Do I need a lawyer for my car accident case?
q4.answer: While not mandatory, it's highly recommended to hire an attorney, especially if there are significant injuries, disputes about fault, or if the insurance company offers a low settlement. An attorney can maximize your compensation and handle the legal complexities while you recover.

q5.question: What happens if the other driver doesn't have insurance?
q5.answer: If the other driver doesn't have insurance, you still have options: you can use your uninsured motorist coverage (if you have it), file a lawsuit directly against the driver, or explore other sources of compensation. An attorney can help you identify all available options in your situation.

q6.question: How much does it cost to hire a car accident attorney?
q6.answer: Most car accident attorneys work on a contingency fee basis, which means they only get paid if they win your case. Typically, this represents between 33% and 40% of the final settlement. You pay nothing upfront, and if there's no recovery, there are no fees.

q7.question: What types of damages can I claim after a car accident?
q7.answer: You can claim economic damages (medical expenses, lost income, property damage) and non-economic damages (pain and suffering, emotional distress, loss of enjoyment of life). In cases of gross negligence, punitive damages may also apply.

q8.question: What if I was partially at fault for the accident?
q8.answer: Depending on your state's laws, you may still be entitled to compensation. Some states follow comparative negligence rules, where your compensation is reduced by your percentage of fault. Other states have stricter contributory negligence rules.

q9.question: How long does it take to resolve a car accident case?
q9.answer: The time varies significantly depending on the complexity of the case. Simple cases can be resolved in a few months, while complex cases with serious injuries can take 1-3 years or more. Your attorney can give you a more specific estimate based on your particular situation.

chiropractic.title: Chiropractic Therapy
chiropractic.description: Spinal adjustments and manipulations to relieve pain and improve mobility after car accidents.

rehabilitation.title: Injury Rehabilitation
rehabilitation.description: Comprehensive rehabilitation programs designed specifically for car accident injuries.

physical_therapy.title: Physical Therapy
physical_therapy.description: Therapeutic exercises and techniques to restore strength, flexibility, and function.

hot_cold_therapy.title: Hot/Cold Therapy
hot_cold_therapy.description: Thermal treatments that help reduce inflammation and relieve muscle pain.

massage.title: Massage Therapy
massage.description: Therapeutic massages to relieve muscle tension and improve circulation.

ultrasound.title: Ultrasound Therapy
ultrasound.description: Sound waves that penetrate deep tissues to promote healing and reduce pain.

tens.title: Electrical Stimulation (TENS)
tens.description: Electrical impulses that help control pain and stimulate muscle recovery.

second_opinions.title: Second Opinions
second_opinions.description: Additional medical evaluations to ensure you receive the most appropriate treatment.

xray.title: Digital X-Rays
xray.description: Advanced imaging technology for accurate diagnosis of bone and joint injuries.

mri.title: MRI Request and Results Reading
mri.description: Coordination of magnetic resonance imaging and professional interpretation of results.

pain_management.title: Pain Management Specialist
pain_management.description: Specialized medical care for chronic pain management and advanced treatments.

surgical_consultations.title: Surgical Consultations with Specialist
surgical_consultations.description: Evaluations with surgical specialists when conservative treatment is not sufficient.

concussion.title: Concussion Diagnosis
concussion.description: Specialized evaluation and treatment for traumatic brain injuries from car accidents.

free_transport.title: Free Transportation
free_transport.description: Round-trip transportation service to ensure you can attend all your appointments.

trilingual.title: Trilingual Care
trilingual.description: Medical care in Spanish, English, and Portuguese for better communication.

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: Car Injury Clinic is a specialized medical center dedicated to treating injuries resulting from car accidents. With years of experience and a multidisciplinary team, we provide comprehensive care from initial evaluation to complete recovery.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide exceptional medical care to car accident victims, helping them recover their health and quality of life through personalized treatments and cutting-edge technology.

excellence.title: Medical Excellence
excellence.description: We maintain the highest standards of medical care with certified professionals and advanced technology.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.description: We understand the physical and emotional impact of accidents and provide care with empathy and understanding.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act with honesty and transparency in all our interactions with patients and their families.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously incorporate the latest advances in medicine and technology to improve our treatments.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our multidisciplinary team consists of doctors, chiropractors, physical therapists, and support staff, all specialized in treating car accident injuries.

facilities.title: Our Facilities
facilities.description: We have modern facilities equipped with the latest technology for diagnosis and treatment, designed to provide a comfortable and safe environment for our patients.
